summary: Replaced the hardcoded minigame branch chain with a static MINIGAME_REGISTRY so new money-path lane modules can register render and count hooks through a single extension point.

pattern_notes: Browser-native modules are a viable future extraction path, but the current repo intentionally has no npm install or build step.
Plugin-style systems use named extension points and metadata so new functionality does not require open-ended dispatch branching.
For this static Atlas slice, a local registry gives future lanes a single place to add renderer and progress-count hooks while preserving the current deployment model.

contract: Each minigame id maps to a render(lane) hook.
Each minigame id maps to a count(lane) hook for shared step controls.
Unregistered minigame ids fall back to the generic checkpoint board.
New module guidance lives in web/games/README.md.
